repository.metadataPolicy: Committed docs keep deterministic placeholders; scripts/docs/mkdocs_hooks/version_stamp.py resolves the actual repository revision and source date when MkDocs builds the site.

toolchain.runtimePolicy: GitHub Actions generates Node-derived docs with the pinned toolchain; Read the Docs builds MkDocs from committed artifacts.
toolchain.rtdBehavior: Read the Docs consumes committed generated artifacts only.
